title: Vietnamese-Style Noodle Dessert
description: A light and refreshing dessert made with noodles, gelatin, and a touch of rustic charm.
instructions: Soak the noodles in water for 5-7 minutes, or until softened.
Drain and cut the noodles into shorter lengths.
In a separate bowl, dissolve the gelatin in 1 cup of boiling water.
Add the rustic sugar to the gelatin mixture and stir until dissolved.
Combine the noodles and gelatin mixture, stirring until well coated.
Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Top with crumbly cookie crumbs before serving.
If desired, add a few drops of food coloring to tint the dessert.
